_comment: Render baseline — expected per-frame metrics at specific capture frames. CI compares actual metrics against these thresholds. These values represent minimum acceptable metrics and must not be lowered without justification.

10.note: Frame 10: Nintendo/TP logo fade-in — black background + logo elements (J2D orthographic draws). After RASC ortho fix, background is correctly black; nonblack area is the logo only (~5-30%). Previously 95% nonblack was a RASC grey fallback bug (grey background), not a real logo.

30.note: Frame 30: Nintendo/TP logo visible — black background + logo (J2D). Nonblack from logo elements only. After RASC ortho fix, background stays black.

60.note: Frame 60: Nintendo logo fade animation — expected ~4% nonblack (maroon logo on black background). clearEfb correctly outputs black after tev_reg_dirty fix. Logo is near bottom of fade-down cycle at this frame.

90.note: Frame 90: Nintendo logo fade animation — expected ~4% nonblack (maroon logo on black background), same phase as frame 60. avg_rgb=[9,0,0] is consistent expected behavior — maroon logo with correct black background from clearEfb tev_reg_dirty fix. Captured in Phase 2 TP_VERIFY_CAPTURE_FRAMES.

120.note: Frame 120: logo fade-out — black background + remaining logo elements. After RASC ortho fix, background is correctly black; nonblack only for logo draw area. min_unique_colors=1 because at fade-out the logo r<32 so the 3-bit hash collapses all pixels to bucket-0 (same quantization bin as black). unique_colors=2 only when logo r>=32 (fade-in/peak).

129.note: Frame 129: 3D BG room renders grey via RASC fallback (passclr perspective fix). 7335 J3D DL draws produce ~79% nonblack grey output. Threshold set to 50% (below 79% actual) to catch regressions while allowing minor rendering variation. Texture loading is future work (Phase 5+).

300.note: Frame 300: Phase 4 title scene — PROC_TITLE active, J3D logo model should be rendering grey (RASC fallback) after mDoExt_modelEntryDL fix. Threshold starts at 0 until CI confirms nonblack%; raise to 1 after first confirmed grey frame.

350.note: Frame 350: Phase 4 title scene — title logo should be rendering. Threshold at 0 until CI confirms; raise to 1 after frame_300 confirmed.

400.note: Frame 400: Phase 4 title scene — sustained title rendering. Threshold at 0 until CI confirms.

global._note: All global fields are enforced by verify_port.py. Raise thresholds as rendering improves, never lower.

pipeline._note: Pipeline requirements. Set require_textures=true once texture loading works, require_textured_shaders=true once TEV applies textures, etc. Each flag gates a pipeline stage check. Raise these as rendering progresses — never disable a requirement that was previously enabled.

_anti_cheat_note: Do not lower these thresholds. Global min_peak values ensure the rendering pipeline is functional. Per-frame thresholds should be raised as rendering improves, never lowered. Pipeline requirements gate each rendering stage. Changes to this file should be reviewed carefully.
